text: Sandy Fire in Simi Valley: 836 acres scorched, evacuations expanded - ABC7 Los Angeles

text: Gunmen kill 3 people at San Diego Islamic centre in suspected hate crime - Al Jazeera

text: All of Musk’s claims in lawsuit against OpenAI dismissed in federal trial - The Washington Post
fullText: Elon Musk’s claims against ChatGPT maker OpenAI were rejected by a jury that found he missed the statute of limitations. Musk attacked the judge in an online post.

text: Long Island Rail Road strike to end as MTA, unions reach tentative deal - CBS News

text: Trump: TrumpRx site adds hundreds of generic drugs - Axios

text: ICE agent charged in shooting of immigrant during Operation Metro Surge - Star Tribune
fullText: The Hennepin County Attorney’s Office issued a nationwide arrest warrant, saying agent shot the man and then lied about it. The Department of Homeland Security has referred to the charges as an unlawful “political stunt.”

text: Man crashed into Channel Islands, set off major wildfire, officials say - SFGATE

text: Contractor Dies at SpaceX’s Starbase Facility in Texas - WSJ

fullText: A newly discovered asteroid estimated to be about 62 feet wide will zoom near Earth on Monday, though it isn’t expected to pose a threat to the planet.
